content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are consistently matched to the live read and sequenced correctly: starting with the laugh (incongruence), tracking the language switch from agency to passive voice, refusing to engage either the partner-picking advice trap or the intellectualization, and steadily inviting feeling. When the client deflects with theory at turn 11, the coach names the move-away (turn 12) rather than chasing the content. Critically, the coach refuses to take the bait at turn 13 ('Where are you going with this?') with 'I'm not going anywhere' — a clean non-collusion move — and then offers an earned, minimal invitation to sit in the relief. The sequence (notice incongruence → name the agency shift → gentle invitation that lands as not-accusation → track somatic → name the deflection → invite stay) follows the coaching path. The coach holds steady through prickliness (turn 5's 'I know what you're angling at,' turn 15's 'God, you're annoying') without defending or retreating. Moves are AoA-specific (apply-view-to-the-voice at turn 4, naming the configuration without accusing at turn 6, somatic redirect at turns 8/10/14) and not prescriptive.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with the incongruence (the laugh) rather than the content — strong AoA opening move matched to read."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the language switch between agency and passive voice — precise move at the moment it appeared."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds the configuration as something she's producing without accusation; gentle 'what's that about' invites rather than instructs. Risks slight push but stays inquiry-shaped."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pivots to felt experience when intellectual frame surfaces — feeling before story, correctly sequenced."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the somatic/affective thread (the crack-through moment) rather than chasing the analysis."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the deflection-into-neuroscience precisely; tracks the move-away rather than the content."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the 'where are you going' bait with 'I'm not going anywhere' — non-agenda stance — then offers a minimal, earned invitation to stay in the relief. Excellent timing."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["i-dont-buy-your-story", "if-i-were-inherently-good", "deconstruct-the-victim-to-release-anger"],
  "notes": "Conversation ends mid-arc, so the receiving-state/abyss invitation hasn't yet been deployed — but the path is clearly headed there. No traps triggered: no partner-picking advice, no validation of disdain, no 'you choose this' as accusation, no attachment-style diagnosis. The coach earned each step."
}
